three_star.title: Daily Broadcast
three_star.content: You make every ordinary Tuesday feel like a loading screen that actually matters.

three_star.title: Daily Broadcast
three_star.content: I like that you exist. That's it. That's the whole thought.

three_star.title: Daily Broadcast
three_star.content: Your taste in everything is genuinely scary good. Interior design, games, people (me, specifically).

three_star.title: Daily Broadcast
three_star.content: You have this thing where you make complicated things feel simple. I find that very annoying and very attractive.

three_star.title: Daily Broadcast
three_star.content: Not everyone gets a person who actually listens. I got one.

three_star.title: Daily Broadcast
three_star.content: The way you see space and color and form — and somehow also find time to be this funny — is not normal. In a good way.

three_star.title: Daily Broadcast
three_star.content: I think about you a lot when I'm doing completely unrelated things. Hazard of knowing you.

three_star.title: Daily Broadcast
three_star.content: You could probably make a Google Slides look like a luxury editorial. It's a little unfair to everyone else.

three_star.title: Daily Broadcast
three_star.content: Every conversation with you has at least one moment that makes me think 'yeah, okay, this one's different.'

three_star.title: Daily Broadcast
three_star.content: I'm really glad we decided to figure this out together.

five_star.title: Date Voucher
five_star.description: One full day in Bandung, your itinerary, my presence. Non-negotiable.
five_star.terms: Redeemable anytime. No expiry on the feelings.

five_star.title: Date Voucher
five_star.description: You choose the restaurant. I pay, I show up, I listen to all of it.
five_star.terms: Zero judgment on the restaurant choice. Zero.

five_star.title: Date Voucher
five_star.description: We find an art or design exhibition. You explain everything to me. I will not pretend to understand and then immediately understand.
five_star.terms: Counts double if it's a design exhibition.
